author: Admin
title: What is the best first pilot for non-financial RWA?
content: For an MVP platform, which industry do you think is the most suitable for the first real pilot and why?

comments.author: Researcher A
comments.content: Ticketing is a strong candidate because the access right is clear and users easily understand the benefit.

comments.author: Merchant User
comments.content: I also think tea and baijiu are interesting because provenance is directly linked to trust and pricing.
